---
title: "Past Workshops"
sidebar: false
---

These are the frozen 2024 workshop materials, kept for reference. They are not
maintained and may not match the current 2026 environment, but the lesson
content and exercises remain available to browse.

- [Workshop 1 — Reproducible Data Analysis with R](archive/materials/1-workshop1/0-welcome/index.html)
- [Workshop 2 — High-Dimensional Data: The Human Microbiome](archive/materials/2-workshop2/0-welcome/index.html)
- [Workshop 3 — Bioinformatics & Viral Genomics](archive/materials/3-workshop3/0-welcome/index.html)
